response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure. However, he falls significantly short of the core requirement of 8+ years of experience building production-grade AI solutions, as his AI exposure appears limited to his most recent role. Furthermore, he lacks professional experience with Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures, which are critical for this position.
strengths: Extensive staff-level engineering experience with strong full-stack and architectural capabilities.
Demonstrated expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS infrastructure deployment.
Recent hands-on experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.
concerns: Lacks the required minimum of 8 years of experience specifically building AI-driven solutions.
No demonstrated professional experience with Python, which is a required key technology.
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, and LLM evaluation frameworks.
